title: hieracium sagittatum subsp. lasiocybe
intro: Hieracium sagittatum subsp. lasiocybe, also known as crested hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium sagittatum subsp. lasiocybe include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its ability to act as a natural antacid. Herbal preparations of Hieracium sagittatum subsp. lasiocybe include teas and infusions made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
